response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software craftsman with strong web, backend, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, performance architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in the resume. Background is almost entirely application-layer software (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang web services, GIS platforms) with no demonstrated experience in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD design, deep learning workload optimization, or chip-level performance analysis. Educational path (BS + ~13 years) meets the minimum bar numerically, but the experience is not in the relevant domain.
strengths: Long track record (~13 years) of professional software engineering across multiple domains
Some low-level/performance-adjacent work in DLang at Dunnhumby (low-latency, async I/O, high-throughput systems)
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing, workshops, open-source contributions)
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience whatsoever
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization background
No evidence of hardware-software co-design, SIMD/MIMD, or chip-level performance analysis

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
